name: dRPC
description: Decentralized RPC network aggregating independent node operators across 150+ chains with automatic failover and pay-per-request pricing.

seo.title: dRPC — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: dRPC: Decentralized RPC network aggregating independent node operators across 150+ chains with automatic failover and pay-per-request pricing.

when_to_use: Decentralized RPC with automatic failover for dapps
Pay-per-request pricing for low-volume Web3 projects
150+ chain coverage for multi-chain analytics platform
Redundant node routing for high-availability blockchain app
Cost optimization replacing centralized RPC providers

review.verdict: Smart decentralized RPC approach at competitive pricing—great secondary provider, even better with growth.
review.best_for: Dapps wanting redundant, pay-as-you-go RPC across many chains
review.not_for: Teams that need deep enhanced APIs or vendor-backed SLAs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
